message:
fix: MCP start() self-detection for stdio transport

getStatus() reports running=true with the current process PID when
transport is stdio (even before the server starts). This caused
start() to throw "already running" with the process's own PID.

Now skips the "already running" check when the detected PID matches
the current process, matching the same logic in commands/mcp.ts.

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>
